MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, 2363 24th avenue, LLC is present. Represented by Irena Raysberg.
Attorney, Daniel Cheung is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sofya Perinsky and Yuri Perinsky are present.
Attorney, John Richard Weinstein is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 02, 2013 remains on calendar.
